ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Visa_Expiry_Date__c)), Visa_Expiry_Date__c < TODAY()), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(TRN_Expiry_Date__c)), TRN_Expiry_Date__c < TODAY()), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Trade_License_Expiry_Date__c)), Trade_License_Expiry_Date__c < TODAY()), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Passport_Expiry_Date__c)), Passport_Expiry_Date__c < TODAY()), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(National_Id_Expiry_date__c)), National_Id_Expiry_date__c < TODAY()), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Emirates_ID_Expiry_Date__c)), Emirates_ID_Expiry_Date__c < TODAY()), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Company_RERA_Registration_Expiry__c)), Company_RERA_Registration_Expiry__c < TODAY()), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Company_Registration_Expiry_Date__c)), Company_Registration_Expiry_Date__c < TODAY()) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Expiry date cannot be in the past
